title: Scrapbook & Cards Today Feature
excerpt: I'm so excited to be sharing my feature in the Summer 2012 issue of Scrapbook & Cards Today . They asked me to contribute 3 different layout ideas for the "easy detailed expert" section. The issue is full of great…
body:
I'm so excited to be sharing my feature in the Summer 2012 issue of Scrapbook & Cards Today.

They asked me to contribute 3 different layout ideas for the "easy detailed expert" section. The issue is full of great ideas and beautiful layouts. You can view and download a copy for free here.
